collider_contract: root capsule covers main body only; charge and weak-point volumes are separate runtime hitboxes derived from sockets

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Ground
socket_plan.purpose: bottom-center pivot and four-foot grounding reference

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Head
socket_plan.purpose: head, mask, tusk, or crest swap

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Mouth
socket_plan.purpose: bite/spit point; separate from charge hitbox

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_ChestCore
socket_plan.purpose: front chest core and charger read

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Back
socket_plan.purpose: saddle armor, mane, crest, or shell attachment

socket_plan.name: SOCKET_Tail
socket_plan.purpose: tail, tail club, or rear VFX attachment

minimum_animation_clips.name: idle_loop
minimum_animation_clips.notes: subtle breathing; four paws remain planted

minimum_animation_clips.name: move_loop
minimum_animation_clips.notes: trot loop with stable foot contacts

minimum_animation_clips.name: turn_in_place
minimum_animation_clips.notes: short quadruped pivot without foot sliding

minimum_animation_clips.name: charge_windup
minimum_animation_clips.notes: front mass lowers and braces; attack tell visible by frame 8

minimum_animation_clips.name: skid_recovery
minimum_animation_clips.notes: charge end skid; no instant turn

minimum_animation_clips.name: hit_light
minimum_animation_clips.notes: small side recoil, paws keep readable contact
